message:
Move web_fetch cache to XDG cache directory

Cache files now go to $XDG_CACHE_HOME/serf/web_cache/ instead of
.serf/web_cache/ in the project directory. URLs are global so the
cache belongs in the user's cache dir, not project state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
